title: CampaignCharter v1
description: A0.1 campaign charter: defines direction, constraints, and governance for a campaign.

domain.description: Primary target domain for evaluation/constraints. Not a hard lock: cross-domain material may inform ideas, but claims must still satisfy target-domain constraints and grounding.

approval_gate_ref.description: Reference to the orchestrator gate config or an artifact URI for A0.1.

extensions.description: Domain-specific knobs (kept out of the stable surface).
